description: Capacity planning scenarios — resource forecasting, right-sizing, HPA tuning

scenarios.description: Forecast when namespace quota will be exhausted based on growth trends.
scenarios.final_response: Production namespace CPU quota will be exhausted in approximately 12 days based on current growth rate of 0.8 cores/day. Current usage is 14.5 of 20 cores (72%). Recommend requesting a quota increase to 30 cores or right-sizing the top 3 consumers.

scenarios.description: Identify over-provisioned workloads and recommend right-sized resource requests.
scenarios.final_response: Found 5 over-provisioned deployments wasting 8.2 CPU cores and 12Gi memory. Top offender: cache-service requests 4 cores but averages 0.3 cores (92% waste). Recommended reducing requests to p95 usage + 20% headroom, saving 6.5 cores cluster-wide.

scenarios.description: Analyze HPA behavior and recommend optimal scaling parameters.
scenarios.final_response: HPA api-gateway is thrashing (14 scale events/hour) because CPU target 50% is too aggressive. Recommended: raise target to 70%, set stabilizationWindowSeconds to 300, and increase minReplicas from 2 to 4 based on baseline traffic patterns.

scenarios.description: Analyze node capacity headroom and identify nodes at risk of pressure.
scenarios.final_response: 2 of 6 worker nodes are at risk: worker-2 at 91% memory (1.2Gi headroom), worker-5 at 87% CPU (1.9 cores headroom). At current growth, worker-2 will hit MemoryPressure within 3 days. Recommend adding 1 worker node or migrating cache workloads to dedicated pool.

scenarios.description: Compare resource consumption across namespaces for cost attribution.
scenarios.final_response: Top 3 namespaces by resource consumption: production (14.5 CPU, 48Gi mem, 38 pods), staging (4.2 CPU, 16Gi mem, 12 pods), monitoring (3.8 CPU, 22Gi mem, 15 pods). Production consumes 64% of cluster resources. Staging is 3.5x over-provisioned relative to its workload.
